scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const ex=process.env.npm_execpath||''; if(ua.startsWith('pnpm/')||/pnpm/.test(ex))process.exit(0);console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
